items.raw_excerpt: Employees of Newfoundland and Labrador’s health authority recently received an email titled June Holiday thanking them for their hard work in recent months — only to find out it was all just a cybersecurity test. Now, the NLHS Digital Health Service CEO is apologizing, saying the email was "not sensitive."
items.summary_en: Health workers in Newfoundland and Labrador got an email that seemed to offer a June holiday. It was only a cybersecurity test, and the digital health chief later apologized.
items.summary_ko: 뉴펀들랜드 래브라도의 의료 종사자들은 6월 휴일을 주겠다는 듯한 이메일을 받았습니다. 하지만 이는 보안 훈련이었고, 디지털 헬스 책임자는 뒤늦게 사과했습니다.
items.title_en: Health workers were promised a day off, but it was a test
items.title_ko: 쉬는 날 약속처럼 보인 이메일, 알고 보니 보안 훈련
items.title_original: N.L. health-care workers got an email promising a day off — but it was only a cybersecurity test

items.raw_excerpt: If you’re driving north along Edgewater Drive past College Park towards Apopka, you may notice the small town of Lockhart. An important hub of lumber and citrus cultivation in the late 1800s, it’s no longer a bustling industrial settlement, but it still possesses a quiet charm and air of historical significance. “We still live on […]
items.summary_en: Lockhart was once a busy center for lumber and citrus in the late 1800s. Today it is a quiet neighborhood near Apopka, Florida with old-fashioned charm and a rich past.
items.summary_ko: 록하트는 1800년대 후반 목재와 감귤 재배의 중심지였던 작은 마을입니다. 지금은 아포프카 인근의 조용한 동네로, 옛 정취와 풍부한 역사를 간직하고 있습니다.
items.title_en: Discover Lockhart, a Small Florida Town with Hidden History
items.title_ko: 플로리다의 작은 마을 록하트, 숨겨진 역사를 만나다
items.title_original: An Orange County Neighborhood You Should Know: I Heart Lockhart - OCFL Newsroom

items.raw_excerpt: San Miguel de Allende, la ciudad patrimonio de la humanidad fue nombrada como la “Ciudad número 1 de México y el Mundo” al ser reconocida por Travel + Leisure.
items.summary_en: San Miguel de Allende was named the number one city in Mexico and the world by Travel + Leisure. The heritage city received the recognition as a place to visit.
items.summary_ko: 세계문화유산 도시 산미겔데아옌데가 Travel + Leisure로부터 멕시코와 세계의 1위 도시로 선정됐다. 이 도시는 방문하기 좋은 곳으로 인정받았다.

items.raw_excerpt: 日本アクセスは、冷凍食品･アイスクリームの食べ放題イベント「チン!するレストラン in SAPPORO」を11月28日から12月15日まで、札幌市中央区のサッポロファクトリーホールで開催している。27日、同所で報道や参加...

items.summary_en: Nippon Access opened an all-you-can-eat frozen food and ice cream event in Sapporo. About 200 items are served at Sapporo Factory Hall from November 28 to December 15.

items.raw_excerpt: Assaí entra novamente na lista das sete comunidades mais inteligentes do mundo
items.summary_en: Assaí, a city in Paraná, Brazil, has been named one of the seven smartest communities in the world for the second time. The ranking recognizes the city's use of technology and innovation to improve quality of life for residents.
items.summary_ko: 브라질 파라나 주의 도시 아사이가 다시 한 번 세계에서 가장 지혜로운 일곱 커뮤니티 중 하나로 뽑혔습니다. 이 도시는 기술과 혁신을 활용해 주민의 삶의 질을 높인 점을 인정받았습니다.

items.raw_excerpt: Zürich hat eine neue Anlaufstelle für Crack-Konsumierende eingerichtet. Das Container-Dorf von der Kasernenwiese ist in die früheren Polizeigaragen umgezogen.
items.summary_en: Zurich has opened a new support site for people who use crack. The container village from Kasernenwiese has moved into former police garages.
items.summary_ko: 취리히시가 크랙 이용자를 위한 새 지원 공간을 마련했다. 카제르넨비제에 있던 컨테이너 시설은 옛 경찰 차고로 이전했다.
items.title_en: Zurich Opens New Crack Support Site

items.raw_excerpt: Panadería Rosetta in Mexico City was awarded as one of the world’s standout pastry destinations by a prestigious Paris‑based dining guide.
items.summary_en: Panaderia Rosetta in Mexico City won a respected pastry award from a Paris-based dining guide. The Roma Norte bakery was named one of the world's standout pastry spots.
items.summary_ko: 멕시코시티의 파나데리아 로세타가 파리 기반의 권위 있는 미식 안내서에서 페이스트리 상을 받았다. 로마 노르테에 있는 이 빵집은 세계에서 눈에 띄는 페이스트리 명소 중 하나로 선정됐다.

items.raw_excerpt: From celestial virtual reality to powerhouse kitchen takeovers, the Herald rounds up the best ways to keep a crisp, late-autumn weekend lively
items.summary_en: The Buenos Aires Herald lists ways to enjoy a cool late-autumn weekend. The picks include space-themed virtual reality, food events, and a film about Carlos Gardel.
items.summary_ko: 부에노스아이레스 헤럴드가 선선한 늦가을 주말을 즐길 방법을 소개했다. 우주를 주제로 한 가상현실, 음식 행사, 카를로스 가르델 관련 영화가 포함됐다.

items.raw_excerpt: Between trying to make ends meet, Adorni’s Bitcoin fairy tale and the mourning of Indio Solari, Argentina’s favorite obsession is struggling to find room to breathe
items.summary_en: Argentina is too busy with economic hardship, a Bitcoin scandal involving Adorni, and mourning Indio Solari to care about the World Cup. The country's favorite football obsession can't find room to breathe this time.
items.summary_ko: 경제난과 아도르니의 비트코인 스캔들, 그리고 국민 록커 인디오 솔라리의 애도로 아르헨티나는 월드컵에 신경 쓸 겨를이 없다. 축구에 대한 열정이 숨 쉴 틈을 찾지 못하고 있다.
items.title_en: The World Cup is on. Argentina isn't
items.title_ko: 월드컵은 열렸지만, 아르헨티나는 그렇지 않다
items.title_original: The World Cup is on. Argentina isn’t

items.raw_excerpt: A South Australian government fund of more than $28 million for loans and grants for farmers has not been used for the past 10 years, despite the industry struggling through drought and poor market conditions.
items.summary_en: A South Australian government fund of more than $28 million for farmers has gone completely unused for the past decade. The money was meant for loans and grants to help farmers through drought and poor market conditions.
items.summary_ko: 남호주 정부가 농가를 위해 조성한 2800만 달러(약 370억 원) 이상의 기금이 지난 10년간 단 한 번도 사용되지 않았다. 이 기금은 가뭄과 시장 악화로 어려움을 겪는 농민들에게 대출과 보조금을 지원하려는 목적으로 마련됐다.
items.title_en: $28m fund for SA farmers not used for 10 years
items.title_ko: 10년간 한 푼도 안 쓴 농가지원금 2800만 달러
items.title_original: Multi-million-dollar fund for SA farming help not used for a decade

items.raw_excerpt: Cuál es el destino de Córdoba que tiene el lago más limpio de la provincia. Qué hacer en Almafuerte, Córdoba y cómo llegar desde CABA.
items.summary_en: Almafuerte, Córdoba, is described as a hidden spring getaway with the cleanest lake in the province. The article explains what visitors can do there and how to get there from Buenos Aires City.
items.summary_ko: 아르헨티나 코르도바의 알마푸에르테가 주에서 가장 깨끗한 호수를 가진 봄철 숨은 여행지로 소개됐다. 기사에는 현지에서 할 수 있는 일과 부에노스아이레스 시에서 가는 방법이 담겼다.

items.raw_excerpt: Tourists looking for fun conversations and new friends should visit one of these 12 towns in Quebec. Each is full of natural, cultural, and historic charm.
items.summary_en: This article lists 12 small towns in Quebec where locals are known for being welcoming and friendly. Each town offers unique attractions like whale watching, ski resorts, arts festivals, and outdoor activities. These are great destinations for travelers who want warm hospitality and natural beauty.
items.summary_ko: 이 기사는 주민들이 따뜻하고 친근하기로 유명한 퀘벡의 작은 마을 12곳을 소개합니다. 각 마을은 고래 관찰, 스키 리조트, 예술 축제, 야외 활동 등 독특한 매력을 갖추고 있습니다. 따뜻한 환대와 자연의 아름다움을 찾는 여행객에게 좋은 여행지입니다.
items.title_en: 12 Quebec Small Towns Known for Their Friendliness
items.title_ko: 친근함으로 유명한 퀘벡 작은 마을 12곳
items.title_original: 12 Quebec Small Towns With Unmatched Friendliness - WorldAtlas

items.raw_excerpt: Helsinki on pikkukaupunki, josta voi olla ylpeä, sanoo matkailupäällikkö Nina Vesterinen.
items.summary_en: Helsinki is drawing tourists as the capital of a happy country. Tourism chief Nina Vesterinen says Helsinki is a small city people can be proud of, and that it is not expensive or boring.
items.summary_ko: 행복한 나라의 수도로 알려진 헬싱키가 관광객을 끌어들이고 있다. 관광 책임자 니나 베스테리넨은 헬싱키가 자부심을 가질 만한 작은 도시이며, 비싸거나 지루한 곳이 아니라고 말했다.
items.title_en: Helsinki says it is not boring or too costly

items.summary_en: A local Kanazawa team shares its favorite cake shops in Kanazawa and nearby areas. The guide covers cakes for special days and small treats, with some new shops added.

items.raw_excerpt: Construction has started on northwest Tasmania’s new $60 million shopping centre, due for completion in mid-2027, which will feature a huge new Woolworths as its anchor tenant, along with a Chemist Warehouse. Called Stony Rise …
items.summary_en: Builders have started work on a new $60 million shopping centre in northwest Tasmania. It is planned to open in mid-2027 and will have a large Woolworths and a Chemist Warehouse.
items.summary_ko: 호주 태즈메이니아 북서부에서 6천만 달러 규모의 새 쇼핑센터 공사가 시작됐다. 2027년 중반 완공 예정이며, 대형 울워스 매장과 케미스트 웨어하우스가 들어설 예정이다.
items.title_en: Work starts on new Tasmania shopping centre
items.title_ko: 태즈메이니아 새 쇼핑센터 공사 시작

items.raw_excerpt: Tough action is needed to stop the spread of raccoons, which threaten to become a serious problem nationwide, officials in Limburg say. The province is currently home to an estimated 100 to 200 raccoons and some 400 have been killed since 2019. Officials say that although their number is not increasing quickly at the moment, this will change if more efforts are not made to eradicate them from the region. The province has a budget of €750,000 up to 2030...
items.summary_en: Officials in Limburg say around 100 to 200 raccoons live in the province and the number could grow fast without action. About 400 raccoons have been killed since 2019. The province has set aside €750,000 to fight the problem through 2030.
items.summary_ko: 림뷔르흐 주 당국은 약 100~200마리의 너구리가 서식 중이며, 조치를 취하지 않으면 개체 수가 빠르게 늘어날 수 있다고 경고했다. 2019년 이후 약 400마리가 포획됐다. 주 정부는 2030년까지 75만 유로의 예산을 편성했다.
items.title_en: Limburg province acts to stop raccoon invasion
items.title_ko: 림뷔르흐 주, 너구리 확산 막기 위해 나서다
items.title_original: Action needed to combat raccoon plague, Limburg province says

items.raw_excerpt: From the hidden history of Lower Manhattan to Wimbledon's other past, small, vibrant museums are helping communities understand their neighbourhoods' stories, writes Daisy Woodward.
items.summary_en: A BBC story says small museums help people learn the hidden stories of their neighborhoods. The examples include Lower Manhattan and Wimbledon.
items.summary_ko: BBC는 작은 박물관들이 사람들이 자기 동네의 숨은 이야기를 이해하도록 돕고 있다고 전했다. 예시로 로어 맨해튼과 윔블던이 소개됐다.
items.title_en: Small museums tell local history
items.title_ko: 작은 박물관이 전하는 동네 역사
items.title_original: Seven hyperlocal histories revealed - BBC

items.raw_excerpt: Lake Worthin pikkukaupunki sijaitsee Atlannin rannalla tunnin ajomatkan päässä Miamista pohjoiseen. Samaan ryppääseen on kasvanut kiinni muita maaseutukaupunkeja, kuten Lantana, Boynton Beach, Atlantis, South Palm Beach ja Palm Beach. Tälle alueelle on keskittynyt Floridan runsain suomalaisasutus. Lyhyen ajomatkan päässä sijaitsee rikkaiden oma temmellyskenttä, West Palm Beach, luksuskauppoineen ja loistohuviloineen.
items.summary_en: Lake Worth is a small town on Florida's Atlantic coast, about one hour north of Miami. Nearby towns have grown into the same area, and it has Florida's largest Finnish community. Wealthy West Palm Beach is a short drive away.
items.summary_ko: 레이크워스는 마이애미에서 북쪽으로 차로 약 한 시간 떨어진 플로리다 대서양 해안의 작은 도시다. 주변 도시들이 같은 생활권으로 이어졌고, 이 지역에는 플로리다에서 가장 큰 핀란드계 공동체가 자리 잡고 있다. 부유한 웨스트팜비치도 가까운 거리에 있다.
items.title_en: Palms Sway in Little Turku
items.title_ko: 플로리다의 작은 투르쿠에 야자수가 흔들린다
items.title_original: Pikku-Turussa huojuvat palmut - ts.fi
